content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "New Year Transportation". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/500/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains two integers n and t, where n is the number of houses and t is the time it takes for the tram to travel from the first house to the last house. The second line contains n integers representing the distance from the first house to each of the other houses.
content.outputFormat: The minimum time it takes to visit all houses and return to the starting point.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a greedy algorithm to find the minimum time it takes to visit all houses and return to the starting point.

code.Python3:
n, t = map(int, input().split())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
time = sum(arr) * 2
print(time)
